case_title: NADIA MOHAMED VS. MUFEED SALEH HUMRAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMED, NADIA AS TO DEFENDANT HUMRAN, MUFEED SALEH AHMED DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-13-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HUMRAN, MUFEED SALEH AHMED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE FILED BY DEFENDANT HUMRAN, MUFEED SALEH AHMED
ORDER CONTINUING THE TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-17-2013 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON SEP-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATED EX PARTE ORDER FILED 4/25/13. (206)

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-13-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 210 WITH CONFERENCE OFFICER CLARK PATTEN.
MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-13-2013 AT 8:30 AM IS RESCHEDULED TO SEP-13-2013 AT 1:00 PM IN 210. CASE IS ALSO REASSIGNED FOR MSC PURPOSES TO CONFERENCE OFFICER MARCIA POPE.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMED, NADIA
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-16-2013. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED ON 8/21/13. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON OCT-22-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-13-2013 - NOT HELD AND REMOVED. CASE SETTLED PRIOR TO CONFERENCE.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
